name: github_create_user_copilot_space
description: Create a Copilot Space for a user (POST /users/{username}/copilot-spaces). name required; optional description, general_instructions, base_role (reader|no_access), resources_attributes. Returns HTTP 201. See [Create a Copilot Space for a user](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot-spaces/copilot-s
